summary: Comprehensive testing of Syntra premium glassmorphism UI refactor completed successfully. Backend APIs maintain excellent performance (94.4% success rate). Frontend showcases beautiful premium design with glassmorphism effects, gradient backgrounds, Manrope font, and seamless dark/light mode functionality. All core features working perfectly.

minor_bugs.issue: Email validation too strict - rejects .test domains

passed_tests: Invoice creation, retrieval, and PDF download
Landing page loads with premium glassmorphism design
Login page with beautiful glass effects and gradients
Registration page with proper form validation
Dashboard displays correct stats with glass cards
All page navigation (Contacts, Invoices, Excel, Automations, WhatsApp)
Gradient backgrounds and glass cards with backdrop blur
